authorization_id.title: Authorization ID
authorization_id.description: Platform-generated unique identifier for this authorization.

homeowner_id.title: Homeowner ID
homeowner_id.description: Cornerstone ID (DID/URI) of the homeowner granting access to their property portfolio data.

pid.title: PID
pid.description: Provincial land title Parcel Identifier for the property this authorization applies to. Resolves to the specific property without duplicating address data.

data_scope.title: Data Scope
data_scope.description: Array of data category identifiers the recipient is authorized to access. See Enumerated Values for valid options.

authorization_purpose.title: Authorization Purpose
authorization_purpose.description: Human-readable statement of the intent behind the data sharing authorization.

access_level.title: Access Level
access_level.description: Permission tier defining what the recipient can do with the accessed data.

start_date.title: Start Date
start_date.description: Date from which the authorization is valid, in ISO 8601 format.

expiration_date.title: Expiration Date
expiration_date.description: Optional end date for the authorization. Null means the authorization remains valid until explicitly revoked.

authorization_evidence.title: Authorization Evidence
authorization_evidence.description: URI reference to the homeowner action log entry documenting consent.

relationship_category.title: Relationship Category
relationship_category.description: The trust network member's relationship type to the homeowner.
